steps.title: Find the reinforcing link
steps.content: The first sentence says Nogueira believed black-and-white photography's use of lines elevated it to fine art. The next sentence intensifies that claim by calling linear forms photography's "indisputable and exclusive domain." The blank needs a transition that reinforces the first idea rather than shifting away from it.

steps.title: Reject contrast and pivot choices
steps.content: B suggests dismissing or moving past the prior point, but the second sentence continues the same argument. C signals contrast, and D signals concession despite an obstacle; neither relationship appears here. The remaining transition reinforces Nogueira's claim. The answer is A.
